chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.2362 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 11.03.2025 Mr. Muhammad Hanif Samma, advocate for applicant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------------ Applicant/accused Muhammad Faisal alias Kala seeks post arrest bail in FIR No.232/2024, registered at P.S. Ferozabad for offence under sections 397, 34, PPC, after rejection of his bail plea by learned trial Court vide order dated 04.09.2024. Learned counsel for applicant after arguing the matter at some length, does not press the instant criminal bail application and seeks direction for early disposal of the case. Learned Additional Prosecutor General Sindh has recorded her no objection for issuance of such direction. In view of the above, instant criminal bail application is dismissed on merits, with direction to the trial Court to decide the case of the applicant expeditiously, preferably within a period of two months, without granting any adjournment to either party on any flimsy grounds and furnish its report before this Court through learned MIT-II. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
